title.en: Ye Tian was a little interested.

content.en:
"Medium Extradimensional Daoist!"

Ye Tian was a little interested.

He has only advanced to the second realm for a long time, and there are no medium super dimensional dao soldiers, but ordinary medium super dimensional dao soldiers can be traded, and if he breaks through to the third realm in the future, medium super dimensional dao soldiers will be useless to him.

He was full of confidence in his promotion to the third realm, so the demand for mid-level super-dimensional Dao soldiers was not so high.

In other second realms, if you have been in this realm all your life, you naturally want a good medium super-dimensional weapon to enhance your strength.

The starting price of this medium-sized super-dimensional Dao soldier reached 1,000 super-dimensional Dao coins, which is equivalent to ten super-dimensional Chiyuan Pills.

But the final price must be more than that.

Sure enough, several Second Realms continued to participate in the auction, and the prices became higher and higher, and finally let one Second Realm bid away at a price of 3,200 Super Dimensional Dao Coins.

Next, one treasure after another was taken out by Liudu Jieshan for auction, and Du 02 was a treasure of high value.

But Ye Tian did not participate in the auction, and he had not yet seen the treasures that attracted him.

"The next thing to be auctioned is a bottle of Eternal Essence, this treasure is very helpful for improving cultivation, suitable for the second realm to improve cultivation, and the first use has the best effect, the starting price is 2000 Super Dimensional Dao Coins. The Sea Peak Realm Lord said.

"What, Eternal Essence, the last time the Six Capitals Festival, I didn't take out this treasure, and it would be very good to have this Eternal Essence appear three times out of ten Six Capital Events. I have to take it, and with it, I may be able to break the bottleneck of cultivation and be promoted to the late stage of the second realm!"

"It's a pity that there is only one bottle, and I have only broken through to the middle stage of the second realm, if I bid for it, I will only improve my cultivation a little, which will not help my strength much, so I still won't participate in the auction. "

"The Eternal Essence can only be auctioned in the Five Thousand Territory, buying one more bottle is one bottle, and slowly accumulating it, if the quantity is more, it will be easier to improve one's cultivation. "

Now.

Ye Tian was also interested, he lacked the most treasures to assist in improving his cultivation.

Judging from the reactions of the other Second Realms, the Eternal Essence should be very helpful in improving the cultivation of the Second Realm.

Immediately, a group of extradimensional realms began to participate in the auction.

"2300 Super Dimensional Dao Coins!"

"2500 Super Dimensional Dao Coins!"

"5,000 Super Dimensional Dao Coins!"

The second realm is constantly bidding, and it can be seen that the final transaction price may reach about 10,000 super dimensional Dao coins.

Ye Tian is also participating in the auction, he is very prepared this time, he has sold a lot of extra-dimensional resources, and currently has about 100,000 super-dimensional dao coins on his body, which is enough to buy a lot of good things.

Really.

In the end, after Ye Tian handed over 11,000 extra-dimensional dao coins, other extra-dimensional realms no longer participated in the auction.

The Eternal Essence is indeed very good, but if the price paid is too high, it is not worth it, and besides, it is not the only time that the Eternal Essence will appear, so there is no need to pay too high.

Besides, maybe there will be other treasures that will help improve cultivation in the future, so there is no need to stare at one.

Every time a treasure is auctioned, it is sold on the spot.

So.

After Ye Tian directly paid 11,000 Super Dimensional Dao Coins, he got this bottle of Eternal Essence.

Once he got his hands on it, his will reached into it and sensed the breath of the Eternal Essence.

Suddenly.

He sensed a familiar aura.

Although this aura was faint, he had refined similar energy many times, so he was very keen.

"Multi-Dimensional Essence !!!"

However, this wisp of multi-dimensional essence is not the same as the multi-dimensional essence he refined, the multi-dimensional essence he refined is to assist in comprehending the super-dimensional rules, but the role of this wisp of multi-dimensional essence should be to improve cultivation.

In addition to a wisp of multi-dimensional essence, the main material of this bottle of Eternal Essence also has some other resources, which are finally refined into Eternal Essence.

"The power that refines the Eternal Essence definitely has a multi-dimensional treasure bottle, and it is a multi-dimensional treasure bottle that helps to improve cultivation. "

Ye Tian guessed.

This is a Duowei Treasure Bottle, this force dares to expose it directly, aren't you afraid that the Duowei Treasure Bottle will be exposed?

"There should be a strong enough force that other strong people don't dare to snatch the Duowei Treasure Bottle!"

That's how it should be.

Immediately, he consulted the Tianyang Realm Lord.

"Tianyang Realm Lord, do you know which force refined the Eternal Essence, is there a recipe?" Ye Tian asked.

The Tianyang Realm Lord said: "Ye Tian Realm Lord, the Eternal Essence is not refined by the forces behind the Liudu Realm Mountain, it is said to come from a very large force in the Six Thousand Realm, called the Duobao Medicine Society, it is said that this Duobao Medicine Society has a very deep background, and it is even related to the territory with a higher serial number, and there is a powerhouse in the Fourth Realm behind it, as for more information, I don't know." In short, the Duobao Medicine Society is a hegemon-level force for us, and we can't provoke it!"

"I see!"

Ye Tian understood.

There will be a fourth realm on the back of the Duobao Medicine Society, and there may even be more than one.

With such a powerful force, it is no problem to occupy a multi-dimensional treasure bottle that can only be used to improve cultivation.

This kind of multi-dimensional treasure bottle that can improve cultivation is still lower than the multi-dimensional treasure bottle that can help improve the rules of more than 970 dimensions, but it is still one of the treasures that the third and even fourth realms want to snatch.

If you don't have enough strength, you can't keep such a treasure.

Next, one treasure after another was auctioned.

After a while, the treasure that Ye Tian wanted to bid for finally appeared.

"The next auction is the refining map of the medium super dimensional dao soldier, which has ten refining methods of the medium super dimensional dao soldier, and the starting price is 10,000 super dimensional dao soldiers. The Sea Peak Realm Lord said.

"Ten Medium Extradimensional Dao Weapon Refining Diagrams!"

Ye Tian became interested.

If it is auctioned, he can refine a medium super-dimensional dao soldier by himself, and he doesn't need to buy a super-dimensional dao soldier.

Although refining a mid-level extra-dimensional Daoist soldier needs to prepare materials by himself, and there is a possibility of refining failure, he is not worried about this problem.

As long as he is given time, with his multiple abilities to copy his body, he will continue to break into various forbidden treasure lands, and he can definitely acquire all of them, and when the time comes, he can refine as many medium-sized super-dimensional Dao soldiers as he wants.

Thereupon.

He began to participate in auctions.

And there are many second realms that want to refine the map of the medium super-dimensional Dao soldiers, and the competition is also very fierce.

Ye Tian also made a crazy offer, and finally bid for it at the price of 36,000 super dimensional Dao coins.
